description: The Transfiguration — peak performance benchmarks. When an agent produces exceptional output, mark it here as a quality standard for future agents to aspire to.

schema.agentType: string — which agent type produced this
schema.mandateType: string — what kind of work it was
schema.outputRef: string — path to the exceptional output file
schema.whyExceptional: string — what made this output stand out
schema.recordedBy: string — which agent or the Prophet marked this

note: The framework learns from failures (Ecclesiastes, Job findings) but must also learn from successes. Future agents read transfigurations before high-stakes mandates as quality benchmarks.
